name: Multi Step Loader
description: An animated multi-step loading indicator that sequentially highlights steps with checkmarks, showing progress through a series of operations.
whenToUse: Use for loading states, onboarding flows, or multi-step processes where you want to show animated progress through sequential steps.

props.name: duration
props.description: Duration of each step in milliseconds

props.name: loop
props.description: Whether to loop through the steps
